description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front. The screen shows a colorful control center interface with various icons and toggles, typical of an iOS device. The back is plain and matte, with two small camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the upper left corner. The sides are slim and house several physical buttons, including a power button and volume controls. The device appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with a smooth, hard finish. Its overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a minimalist matte finish. The device features side buttons and a colorful control center interface on the display.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen with a colorful control center interface and a slim bezel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the thin profile and a single elongated button, likely the power or mute button.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a matte surface with two small camera lenses and a flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing two distinct buttons, likely for volume control, and a small port or switch above them.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a control center interface with toggles for Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, music playback, screen mirroring, and various app icons, resembling an iOS device's quick settings menu.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are located in the upper left corner on the back, arranged vertically.
attribute_button_layout: One elongated button on the left edge, two smaller buttons and a small port or switch on the right edge.
